relationship_to_restored_text: Interpretive contemplative layer aligned by verse. This does not replace the source-audited restored translation.

verses.mystical_translation: Spirit of Divine fills him with wisdom, understanding, knowledge, and craft.
Stone and wood receive Spirit-taught skill.
Oholiab and every wise-hearted maker receive wisdom.
They make tent, ark, cover, and vessels.
They make table, lampstand, and incense altar.
They make burnt altar, basin, and stand.
They make woven and holy garments.
They make oil and incense according to command.
Sabbath is sign that YHWH sanctifies the people.
The Sabbath is holy and guarded.
Six days work; seventh day Sabbath of deep rest.
Israel keeps Sabbath as age-long covenant.
YHWH ceased and was refreshed; the people carry that sign.
The stone tablets are given, written by finger of Divine.

contemplative_note: Exodus 31 crowns the tabernacle instructions with Spirit-filled craft and Sabbath. Even holy work must stop, because the Maker of all ceased and was refreshed.
